item.description:
What's New

  • add `cleanup` command and fix `validate` OOM
  • add macOS-26.4.1-25E253
  • add cross-origin isolation headers
  • add `sudo` component to all macOS releases
  • add macOS-26.5-25F5053d by @starhaven-bot[bot]
  • add Xcode-26.5-17F5022i by @starhaven-bot[bot]
  • add Xcode-26.4.1-17E202 by @starhaven-bot[bot]
  • add Min macOS and SDK columns to Xcode release index
  • add macOS-26.5-25F5058e by @starhaven-bot[bot]
  • capture SDK build number from SystemVersion.plist

Fixes

  • match bare sudo versions without pN suffix
  • unblock pagefind and Cloudflare Insights in CSP
  • remove unsupported versioning-strategy for Swift
  • use Apple CDN for authenticated XIP downloads
  • improve download validation and error handling
  • fix HTTP status code parsing in pre-flight check
  • fix case-sensitive XAR check and curl progress spam
  • pass CDN URL to scanner for correct `xipFile` field
  • add CORS to API and harden JSON-LD escaping
  • enable cross-origin access for /api/* responses
  • drop inherited CORP header on /api/* responses
  • correct releaseDate for macOS-26.5-25F5058e
  • exclude gnu.org from link check
  • migrate all Xcode xipURLs to services-account portal form

Documentation

  • refresh stale references in README and CLAUDE.md
